title: Create an Organization Account in a Business Center
content:
Use this endpoint to create an Organization Account in a Business Center. > **Note**
> Creating Organization Accounts in a Business Center through API is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative. ## Before you start - Learn [about Organization Accounts](https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/about-organization-accounts). - Learn [the list of unavailable features for Organization Accounts](https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/list-of-unavailable-features-for-organization-accounts). - Ensure the Business Center has passed business verification. To confirm this, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826) and check whether the returned `verification_status` of your Business Center is `VERIFIED`. - Add contact information and billing information to the Business Center on the Business Center UI if these details are missing. - You need to be an Admin user of the Business Center. To confirm your permission to a Business Center, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826) and confirm whether the returned `user_role` is `ADMIN`. - For Agency Business Centers, ensure you have created an ad account for your client using [/bc/advertiser/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939020318721) by specifying `qualification_info` . This can generate a verified `qualification_id` that will be used to associate with the Organization Account you want to create. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/oa/create/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{35%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token.

For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.

Allowed value: `multipart/form-data`.| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{35%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string|The ID of the Business Center.

To obtain the list of Business Centers that you can access, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826).| |display_name {Required}|string|The display name (username) for the Organization Account.

Length limit: 30 characters.| |handle|string|The handle (name) for the Organization Account.

Length limit: 24 characters.

The handle cannot consist solely of numbers.

If the handle is already taken, an error will occur.| |profile_image|file|The file to be used as the profile image for the Organization Account.| |operating_region_code {Required}|string|The code representing the country or region where you would like to run your business.

For enum values, see List of values for `operating_region_code`.

Note: If your business is based in the Chinese mainland, you must select an operating region other than China when creating an Organization Account, as `CN` is not an available option for `operating_region_code`.| |qualification_info {+Conditional}|object|Required when the `type` of your Business Center is `AGENCY` or `SELF_SERVICE_AGENCY`.

Qualification information.

To obtain the type of your Business Center, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826) and check the returned `type`.

If the `type` of your Business Center is `DIRECT` or `SELF_SERVICE`, an error will occur.| #|qualification_id|string|The ID of a verified qualification (business verification) associated with a client's ad account.

To obtain the verified qualification within your Agency Business Center, use [/bc/advertiser/qualification/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1770118680584194) and set `filtering` to `{"verified": true}`.

Note: If you have not yet created an ad account for the client, you can generate a `qualification_id` by calling [/bc/advertiser/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939020318721) and including their `qualification_info`.| ``` ### List of values for `operating_region_code` ```xtable | operating_region_code value{20%} | Description{80%} | |---|---| | `AR` | Argentina | | `AU` | Australia | | `AT` | Austria | | `BD` | Bangladesh | | `BE` | Belgium | | `BR` | Brazil | | `BG` | Bulgaria | | `KH` | Cambodia | | `CA` | Canada | | `CL` | Chile | | `CO` | Colombia | | `HR` | Croatia | | `CY` | Cyprus | | `CZ` | Czechia | | `DK` | Denmark | | `EC` | Ecuador | | `EG` | Egypt | | `EE` | Estonia | | `FI` | Finland | | `FR` | France | | `DE` | Germany | | `GR` | Greece | | `HU` | Hungary | | `ID` | Indonesia | | `IQ` | Iraq | | `IE` | Ireland | | `IL` | Israel | | `IT` | Italy | | `JP` | Japan | | `JO` | Jordan | | `KZ` | Kazakhstan | | `KW` | Kuwait | | `LV` | Latvia | | `LT` | Lithuania | | `LU` | Luxembourg | | `MY` | Malaysia | | `MX` | Mexico | | `MA` | Morocco | | `NL` | Netherlands | | `NZ` | New Zealand | | `NO` | Norway | | `PK` | Pakistan | | `PE` | Peru | | `PH` | Philippines | | `PL` | Poland | | `PT` | Portugal | | `RO` | Romania | | `SA` | Saudi Arabia | | `SG` | Singapore | | `SK` | Slovakia | | `SI` | Slovenia | | `ZA` | South Africa | | `KR` | South Korea | | `ES` | Spain | | `SE` | Sweden | | `CH` | Switzerland | | `TW` | Taiwan (Province of China) | | `TH` | Thailand | | `TR` | Türkiye | | `AE` | United Arab Emirates | | `GB` | United Kingdom | | `US` | United States | | `VN` | Vietnam | ``` ### Example #### Create an Organization Account in a Direct Business Center ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/oa/create/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \ --form 'bc_id="{{bc_id}}"' \ --form 'display_name="{{display_name}}"' \ --form 'handle="{{handle}}"' \ --form 'profile_image="@{{profile_image}}"' \ --form 'operating_region_code="VN"' (/code) ``` #### Create an Organization Account in an Agency Business Center ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/oa/create/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \ --form 'bc_id="{{bc_id}}"' \ --form 'display_name="{{display_name}}"' \ --form 'profile_image="@{{profile_image}}"' \ --form 'handle="{{handle}}"' \ --form 'operating_region_code="US"' \ --form 'qualification_info="{\"qualification_id\": \"{{qualification_id}}\"}"' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code|number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data|object|Returned data.| #|asset_id|string|The ID of the newly created Organization Account.

Note: This ID corresponds to the `asset_id` of the `MANAGED_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT` asset type, which you can retrieve using [/bc/asset/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739432717798401) or [/bc/asset/admin/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739433007779841). Each new Organization Account generates two `asset_id`: one for the `MANAGED_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT` type and one for the `TT_ACCOUNT` type. You can use [/bc/asset/assign/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739438211077121) to assign either asset type to a member, depending on the permissions you wish to grant.| #|asset_name|string|The display name (username) of the created Organization Account.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "asset_id": "{{asset_id}}", "asset_name": "{{asset_name}}" } } (/code) ```
